title: Gbanwee okwuntughe
subtitle: Melite nchekwa akaụntụ gị
requirements: Ga-enwerịrị chars 8+, mkpụrụedemede ukwu, obere mkpụrụedemede, ọnụọgụ na chara pụrụ iche

messages.invalid: Okwuntughe ga-enwerịrị opekata mpe mkpụrụedemede 8, otu mkpụrụedemede ukwu, otu obere obere, otu nọmba na otu mkpụrụedemede pụrụ iche
